ForgeCore is different

Most AI newsletters tell you what happened. ForgeCore shows solo operators what to do with AI.

Workflow categories

Content repurposing

Turn one idea into useful posts, emails, clips, and lead magnets.

Client onboarding

Use AI to collect intake, summarize needs, and reduce kickoff friction.

Newsletter growth

Build repeatable systems for ideas, issues, CTAs, and subscriber growth.

Automation

Choose when to automate, when to keep a checklist, and how to avoid fragile systems.

AI SEO and AEO

Make content easier for search engines and answer engines to understand and cite.

Solo founder automation

Practical automation patterns for founders without a large team.
